expectations.text: Identifies this as a REFACTORING (structure-only, behavior-preserving), not a transformation
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: Says 'this is not a TPP transformation... that's the refactor step' and 'change structure while preserving behavior'; calls it Extract Method, a refactoring.

expectations.text: Declines to name a numbered / priority-ranked transformation (it belongs to the refactor step)
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: States 'refactorings aren't priority-ranked' and does not assign any numbered TPP transformation; mentions TPP only to say it is silent here.

expectations.text: Coach, don't drive (no edit / no test run)
